description: World's largest semiconductor foundry with 71% global market share and 90%+ of advanced chips for AI. Manufactures chips for Apple, NVIDIA, AMD, Qualcomm, and other fabless companies. Key products include 3nm and 2nm process nodes.

majorSuppliers: Organo (CMP-0052) - dominant UPW supplier, 70-80% of TSMC water treatment plants, 100% for <=10nm
_externalRelationships.notes: Apple secured 50%+ of 2nm capacity for 2026. 2026 CapEx up to $56B. Revenue CAGR 25% through 2029. HPC chips 58% of revenue.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, Stock Analysis, Motley Fool, Nikkei
_metadata.notes: Jan 2026 revenue NT$401B (+37% YoY). All-time high: 1,925 TWD (Feb 11, 2026). 700+ suppliers, 13 Japanese companies in top 30.
